calls.prompt_preview: **Scenario Expansion Language Learning Content Generation Request**  **Language:
calls.response:
{
  "title": "Ordering Coffee in a Ljubljana Café",
  "key_phrases": [
    {"phrase": "Želim kavo", "translation": "I would like a coffee"},
    {"phrase": "Kako kavo imate?", "translation": "How do you have the coffee?"},
    {"phrase": "Kavno pivo, prosim", "translation": "Coffee beer, please"},
    {"phrase": "Želim vročo kavo", "translation": "I would like a hot coffee"},
    {"phrase": "Koliko stane?", "translation": "How much does it cost?"},
    {"phrase": "Ali imate sladko kavo?", "translation": "Do you have sweet coffee?"}
  ],
  "scenes": [
    {
      "label": "Outside the Café on a Sunny Morning",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Dober dan, ali imate prosti miza za dve osebi?", "translation": "Good day, do you have a free table for two people?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Seveda, sledite mi prosim.", "translation": "Of course, follow me please."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Hvala lepa, sem Ana in to je Marko.", "translation": "Thank you, I am Ana and this is Marko."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Tu je miza ob oknu, v tem mestu je lepo.", "translation": "Here is the table by the window, the town is beautiful."},
        {"speaker": "female-2", "text": "Ali želite menije?", "translation": "Would you like menus?"},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Ja, prosim.", "translation": "Yes, please."}
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "At the Table – Looking at the Menu",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-2", "text": "Kaj bi radi naročili?", "translation": "What would you like to order?"},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Želim kavo in še rožico sladkorja.", "translation": "I would like a coffee and also a sugar cube."},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Ali želite tudi mleko?", "translation": "Do you also want milk?"},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Ja, prosim, malo mleka.", "translation": "Yes, please, a little milk."},
        {"speaker": "female-2", "text": "Kako kavo imate? Močno ali nežno?", "translation": "How do you have the coffee? Strong or mild?"},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Želim vročo kavo, močno, prosim.", "translation": "I would like a hot coffee, strong, please."},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Ali imate sladko kavo?", "translation": "Do you have sweet coffee?"},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Ne, hvala, raje običajno.", "translation": "No, thank you, I prefer it plain."}
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Ordering at the Counter",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Oprostite, bi lahko dobila dve kavi, prosim?", "translation": "Excuse me, could I get two coffees, please?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Seveda, ena je vroča, druga je hladna?", "translation": "Certainly, is one hot, the other cold?"},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Obe sta vroči, hvala.", "translation": "Both are hot, thank you."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Koliko stane?", "translation": "How much does it cost?"},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Koliko stane? – Dve kavi sta dva evra.", "translation": "How much does it cost? – Two coffees are two euros."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Tukaj je plačilo.", "translation": "Here is the payment."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Hvala lepa, nasvidenje!", "translation": "Thank you, goodbye!"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Sitting Back – Small Talk",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-2", "text": "Kako je vreme danes?", "translation": "How is the weather today?"},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Sonce sije, zato je lepo.", "translation": "The sun is shining, so it's nice."},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Ste že bili v Starem mestu?", "translation": "Have you already been to the Old Town?"},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Ne, bomo kmalu, ker je tukaj dobra kava.", "translation": "No, we will soon, because the coffee here is good."},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "V redu, uživajte!", "translation": "Alright, enjoy!"}
      ]
    }
  ],
  "dialogue_glosses": [
    {"word": "dober", "translation": "good"},
    {"word": "dan", "translation": "day"},
    {"word": "ali", "translation": "whether, or"},
    {"word": "imate", "translation": "have (you)"},
    {"word": "prosti", "translation": "free"},
    {"word": "miza", "translation": "table"},

calls.prompt_preview: **Scenario Expansion Language Learning Content Generation Request**  **Language:
calls.response:
{
  "title": "Ordering Coffee at a Busy Oslo Café",
  "key_phrases": [
    {
      "phrase": "Jeg vil gjerne en kaffe",
      "translation": "I would like a coffee"
    },
    {
      "phrase": "En espresso, takk",
      "translation": "An espresso, please"
    },
    {
      "phrase": "Kaffen er for varm",
      "translation": "The coffee is too hot"
    },
    {
      "phrase": "Jeg tar sukkerpilen",
      "translation": "I’ll take the sugar packet"
    },
    {
      "phrase": "En cappuccino, bitte",
      "translation": "A cappuccino, please (informal)"
    }
  ],
  "scenes": [
    {
      "label": "Entering the café in the morning",
      "lines": [
        {
          "speaker": "male-1",
          "text": "Hei! Jeg vil gjerne en kaffe, takk.",
          "translation": "Hi! I would like a coffee, please."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "female-2",
          "text": "Hei! Hva slags kaffe vil du ha?",
          "translation": "Hi! What kind of coffee would you like?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "male-1",
          "text": "En espresso, takk.",
          "translation": "An espresso, please."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "female-2",
          "text": "Selvfølgelig. Ønsker du melk eller sukker?",
          "translation": "Of course. Do you want milk or sugar?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "male-1",
          "text": "Jeg tar sukkerpilen, men ingen melk.",
          "translation": "I’ll take the sugar packet, but no milk."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "female-2",
          "text": "Ingen problem. Det blir femti kroner.",
          "translation": "No problem. That will be fifty kroner."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "male-1",
          "text": "Her er kortet.",
          "translation": "Here is the card."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "female-2",
          "text": "Takk! Jeg lager den nå.",
          "translation": "Thanks! I’ll make it now."
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Waiting at the counter",
      "lines": [
        {
          "speaker": "male-1",
          "text": "Det er så travelt her i dag.",
          "translation": "It’s so busy here today."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "female-2",
          "text": "Ja, mange er på vei til jobb.",
          "translation": "Yes, many are on their way to work."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "male-1",
          "text": "Jeg liker denne atmosfæren.",
          "translation": "I like this atmosphere."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "female-2",
          "text": "Det er jo koselig, ikke sant?",
          "translation": "It’s cozy, isn’t it?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "male-1",
          "text": "Ja, absolutt.",
          "translation": "Yes, absolutely."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "female-2",
          "text": "Her er espressoen din.",
          "translation": "Here is your espresso."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "male-1",
          "text": "Tusen takk!",
          "translation": "Thank you very much!"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "female-2",
          "text": "Bare hyggelig. Ha en fin dag!",
          "translation": "You’re welcome. Have a nice day!"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Finding a seat and tasting the coffee",
      "lines": [
        {
          "speaker": "male-1",
          "text": "Unnskyld, er dette ledig?",
          "translation": "Excuse me, is this free?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "female-2",
          "text": "Ja, du kan sette deg der borte.",
          "translation": "Yes, you can sit over there."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "male-1",
          "text": "Takk. Kaffeen er litt for varm.",
          "translation": "Thanks. The coffee is a bit too hot."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "female-2",
          "text": "Vent litt, den blir kjøligere om et par minutter.",
          "translation": "Wait a bit, it will cool down in a couple of minutes."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "male-1",
          "text": "Jeg tar en liten pause og leser avisen.",
          "translation": "I’ll take a short break and read the newspaper."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "female-2",
          "text": "Det høres bra ut.",
          "translation": "That sounds good."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "male-1",
          "text": "Kaffen smaker nå mye bedre.",
          "translation": "The coffee now tastes much better."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "female-2",
          "text": "Glad du liker den!",
          "translation": "Glad you like it!"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Ordering a second drink before leaving",
      "lines": [
        {
          "speaker": "male-1",
          "text": "Kan jeg få en cappuccino, bitte?",
          "translation": "Can I have a cappuccino, please?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "female-2",
          "text": "Selvfølgelig, vil du ha ekstra melk?",
          "translation": "Of course, would you like extra milk?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "male-1",
          "text": "Nei, takk. Bare en vanlig.",
          "translation": "No, thanks. Just a regular one."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "female-2",
          "text": "Den blir syvti kroner.",
          "translation": "That will be seventy kroner."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "male-1",
          "text": "Her er kontanter.",
          "translation": "Here is cash."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "female-2",
          "text": "Takk! Jeg lager den nå.",
          "translation": "Thanks! I’ll make it now."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "male-1",
          "text": "Takk for hjelpen i dag.",
          "translation": "Thanks for the help today."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "female-2",
          "text": "Bare hyggelig. Ha det bra!",
          "translation": "You’re welcome. Bye!"
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "dialogue_glosses": [
    {"word": "hei", "translation": "hi"},
    {"word": "jeg", "translation": "I"},
    {"word": "vil", "translation": "would like"},
    {"word": "gjerne", "translation": "gladly"},
    {"word": "en", "translation": "a"},
    {"word": "kaffe", "translation": "coffee"},
    {"word": "takk", "translation": "please/thanks"},
